The '''grapple droideka''', or '''Melee Destroyer Droid,''' was an early variation of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Droideka/Legends|droideka]], developed as the ultimate melee unit, and was unit used during their [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. A trio [[Second Battle of Naboo|guarded]] a [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]]. The Melee Destroyer Droid was tougher than the standard [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] but utilized weaker [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. The primary weapon of the grapple droideka (known simply as the "droideka," at the time) was its lethal mechanical claws. This model was similar to the [[P-series droideka/Legends|P-series droidekas]], which used deadly [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blasters]] to more efficiently eliminate opponents and carried stronger [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generators]].

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Grapple droidekas appear in the [[2000]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]''.
